subject: Physics
question: A ball is projected at an angle of 45° with speed 20 m/s. Find its maximum height (g = 10 m/s²).

subject: Physics
question: Two trains move towards each other at 40 km/h and 60 km/h. What is their relative velocity?
solution: When moving towards each other, relative velocity = sum of speeds = 40 + 60 = 100 km/h.

subject: Physics
question: The range of a projectile is maximum when the angle of projection is:
solution: Range R = u² sin(2θ)/g is maximum when sin(2θ) = 1, i.e., θ = 45°.
